annual_rate.notes: Prejudgment interest under 41 P.S. Sec. 202 — 6% (simple interest). This is PREjudgment interest (accruing before entry of judgment) and is separate from Pennsylvania’s post-judgment rate; availability is limited by claim type (see the page). Verify against the statute text. Not legal advice.
